headline: Gartner Marketing Survey Finds 50% of Consumers Prefer Brands That Avoid Using GenAI in Consumer-Facing Content
summary: STAMFORD, Conn., March 16, 2026--Half of U.S. consumers (50%) say they would prefer to give their business to brands that do not use GenAI, according to a survey by Gartner, Inc., a business and technology insights company. In this survey, "brands that use GenAI" refers to brands incorporating GenAI in consumer-facing messages, advertising and content.
